title: Managing annual leave balances
excerpt: Good afternoon - we currently have an annual leave board aligned to workform when requesting time off, what I want is to be able to have a board that auto updates when leave is approved so all can see their remaining bal…

posts.author: Nicky_Miller (Nicky Miller)
posts.cookedHtml: Good afternoon - we currently have an annual leave board aligned to workform when requesting time off, what I want is to be able to have a board that auto updates when leave is approved so all can see their remaining balances, also for this to be down to per hour basis or minimum of half days. I have searched through YouTube but have only been able to find the approval boards?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: You’ll want to create another board with ‘inventory’ ie their starting hours. You can then use an automation that when the request is changed to Approved, that it decreases the ‘inventory’ by X number.
